found.quote: Vendor will process Personal Data only on documented instructions from Customer, including this DPA, the master services agreement, order forms, and written directions from authorized Customer personnel.
Vendor may study service records, build trend reports, tune automated systems, create commercial benchmarks, and enhance offerings for accounts other than Customer.
Vendor will send an initial written alert about a Personal Data Breach within 10 business days after discovering it only if forensic review confirms outbound extraction.
After the relationship ends, Vendor will remove hosted account content within 120 days and will not be required to provide written completion evidence.
Vendor may move hosted records among facilities and affiliates in the United States, Canada, Ireland, India, and Singapore without standard contractual clauses or transfer impact documentation.
